summary.contentAssessment: The source is a CP study-question generator scaffold rather than a library of standalone lectures, algorithms, or images.
notes: The only explicit curriculum-like payload is the ABPath CP blueprint used to seed question generation.
The rest of the project is application logic, UI, and supporting schema/prompt code.
No standalone media or lecture assets were identified outside dependency content in the Python environment.

tutorials.reason: Contains the domain/objective blueprint that drives study-question generation and is the only direct educational content artifact.

dependencies.role: Consumes the blueprint to generate questions.
Defines the topic/objective taxonomy and question templates.
UI entry point for the study workflow.
Data models for generated study content.

recommendation: Migrate the blueprint file first if you want reusable study content; do not expect independent lecture, algorithm, or image datasets in this bundle. Normalize the blueprint into target tutorial records before attempting broader extraction.
